steps.expected: 400 invalid_parameter with the required missing-selector message
steps.observed: Returned 400 with error=invalid_parameter and message=One of ids, names, or symbols must be provided.

assertions.title: /diagnostics/runtime reports ready fresh-live state truthfully

steps.observed: Returned 200 but reported readiness.state=degraded, degraded.active=true, shared_market_snapshot.available=true, source_class=stale_live, reason=database disk image is malformed.

assertions.issues: Mission API was not in the expected ready fresh-live state during validation.

assertions.title: fresh-live trust slice stays coherent across all scoped surfaces

steps.expected: Diagnostics report source_class=fresh_live before comparing route outputs
200 with populated market row for bitcoin
200 with populated live-backed market_data for bitcoin

assertions.issues: The assigned mission API never entered the required fresh_live state, and all three scoped market surfaces returned 500 instead of coherent live-backed values.

assertions.title: shared timestamps stay mutually consistent across the trust slice

steps.observed: Returned 200 with last_successful_live_refresh_at=2026-04-02T18:40:35.734Z and stale_live degraded state.

steps.expected: 200 responses exposing comparable timestamps across all three trust-slice routes
steps.observed: Each route returned 500 internal_server_error, so timestamp fields were unavailable for comparison.

assertions.issues: Blocked by 500 responses from all three trust-slice routes, preventing timestamp comparison despite diagnostics exposing a stale_live snapshot timestamp.

frictions.description: The shared mission API on port 3001 was already in a degraded stale_live state rather than the expected fresh_live state, so fresh-live assertions could not be exercised as specified.
frictions.resolution: None; subagent was instructed not to restart or mutate services.

blockers.description: All scoped market-bearing mission API routes on port 3001 returned 500 internal_server_error for bitcoin requests while /diagnostics/runtime reported degraded stale_live with reason "database disk image is malformed".
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried equivalent /simple/price requests with and without optional fields and confirmed the error persisted; no service restarts or override mutations were permitted.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions: 1 passed, 2 failed, and 1 was blocked. /simple/price missing-selector validation passed, but the mission API was degraded/stale_live instead of ready/fresh_live and bitcoin trust-slice routes returned 500 responses.
